items.name_en: 【Top Grade Replica】New Arrival🎉1BH082 Shoulder Bag🎉 This versatile handbag is crafted from leather, featuring a simple and exquisite design. The webbed shoulder strap is embellished with a letter logo, adding a dynamic touch. It comes with two interchangeable and adjustable long shoulder straps. The combination of LOGO fabric webbing and cowhide is perfect 😘, offering versatile styling for different occasions and outfits 😘. It has ample capacity with multiple compartments and a super soft feel. Get yours now!🎉 Dimensions: 22x14.5x8.5cm!

items.name_en: 【Top Grade】🎉New Three-in-One🎉1B is here👏 This mini envelope bag features a front flap, with the iconic engraved logo embellishing the front, showcasing the brand's style. The magnetic closure design remains classic, and the woven strap transforms it into a crossbody or shoulder bag, paired with a small coin purse for versatile functionality and use as a clutch😘😘 The soft lambskin lining features a small pocket with a detachable mirror, a thoughtful design. Simple and stylish, ladies hurry up and get one🎉🎉🎉👏
